subject:
Re: Tomogram CTF estimation / Reconstruction of CTF corrected
 tomograms
body:
Problem solved!

Dmitry tested one of my tilt-series and everything worked fine, going back 
- I hadn't been deleting .xml files corresponding to each tilt series 
between attempts, something was wrong with my first attempt (no dose 
specified I think) which was not fixed by reimporting without deleting 
these files.

Steps to fixing problem
Remove all .tomostar files
remove all .xml files for tilt-series (not individual movies)
reimport tilt series with the "import tilt series" task dialogue
launch ctf estimation!

Thanks for the help Dmitry.

Alister

On Tuesday, 3 December 2019 20:04:22 UTC+1, Alister Burt wrote:
>
> Hi Dmitry, 
>
> The having crashed previously is definitely a possibility, my first tests 
> were just hitting buttons to try things without really knowing what was 
> happening. The tip about the tomostar and xml files is useful, thank you. 
>
> I did the control about half an hour ago with EMD-10164 (HIV) and 
> unfortunately that works fine under the same workflow - I’ll dig a little 
> deeper and send you a tilt-series tomorrow! 
>
> Cheers, 
>
> Alister
